subject: [PATCH 4/4] nfsd: fix ino_t format specifier in nfsd_handle_dir_event tracepoint

2026-05-23.patch_summary: This patch fixes a format specifier issue in the nfsd_handle_dir_event tracepoint by changing it to use u64 for inode->i_ino, which is now a 64-bit value. This ensures that the tracepoint accurately represents the inode number. The change affects the fs/nfsd/trace.h file and corrects an inconsistency between the type of inode->i_ino and its format specifier in the tracepoint.
